recommendations.title: BLUE LOCK THE MOVIE -EPISODE NAGI-
recommendations.overview: When apathetic gamer Nagi agrees to join his rich classmate Mikage in soccer, their partnership leads to the famous Blue Lock program — and to changes.

recommendations.title: One Piece Film Red
recommendations.overview: A new adventure begins for Luffy and his crew when mysterious pop superstar Uta unveils her identity — and launches a misguided plan for world peace.

recommendations.title: Secret Magic Control Agency
recommendations.overview: The Secret Magic Control Agency sends its two best agents, Hansel and Gretel, to fight against the witch of the Gingerbread House.

recommendations.title: Bleach the Movie: Fade to Black

recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: Evil Goddess Eris
recommendations.overview: In the first anime film of the Saint Seiya series, Seiya and the gang must defeat mysterious Ghost Knights to save the world from the pending resurrection of Eris, the Goddess of Chaos!

recommendations.title: Vampire Hunter D
recommendations.overview: In a far-future time ruled by the supernatural, a young girl requests the help of a vampire hunter to kill the vampire who has bitten her and thus prevent her from becoming a vampire herself.

recommendations.title: Words Bubble Up Like Soda Pop
recommendations.overview: After meeting one day, a shy boy who expresses himself through haiku and a bubbly but self-conscious girl share a brief, magical summer.

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: London, At the Edge of Time
recommendations.overview: To save the future from a terrible fate, Marinette becomes Chronobug and teams up with Bunnyx to defeat a mysterious opponent who travels through time.

recommendations.title: Back of the Net
recommendations.overview: A new student at a soccer academy is determined to beat her rival's team in the national tournament.

recommendations.title: Gregory's Girl
recommendations.overview: A teenager falls hard for the female soccer player who has replaced him on the team and attempts to pursue her.
